name: performance.three_site_bandit_cannibal_wait_30m
description: Blocked direct-range performance-audit guardrail: intended to prove three active hostile overmap AI sites, with a persisted remembered-lead bandit camp plus two seeded direct-range cannibal_camps. Run 20260429_035001 proved this footing only reaches sites=3 active_sites=2 because the two direct-range cannibal sites consume the live player-pressure cap before the remembered-lead bandit camp dispatches. Retain this scenario as blocked/cap evidence; do not rerun it as the next green-row proof without a material footing or contract change.

steps.label: post_load_three_site_perf_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the three-site performance fixture; this is startup/load plus fixture footing only

steps.label: preflight_three_site_bandit_lead_perf_fixture
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the persisted remembered camp-map lead needed for the bandit half of the three-site performance row
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains the remembered-lead bandit camp with player target player@140,39,0 before the measured live cadence starts; startup fixture_install applied_save_transforms must show the two cannibal seed offsets, and same-run abstract_bootstrap/dispatch/perf artifact lines must prove those cannibal profiles entered the live path
steps.failure_rule: If the remembered lead is missing or malformed, later timing cannot be credited to the intended three-site performance row.

steps.label: measure_30_minutes_three_site_bandit_cannibal
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through a bounded 30-minute overmap AI cadence window with one preflight-proven remembered-lead bandit site plus two seeded cannibal sites later proven by same-run abstract-bootstrap/dispatch/perf lines; performance credit depends on same-run debug artifacts with signals=0, not the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the three-site perf/cadence lines, this row is inconclusive.

steps.label: audit_three_site_perf_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain compact three-site perf counters and expected bandit remembered-lead plus two cannibal direct-range artifact lines
steps.failure_rule: No three-site performance row credit if the same-run artifact lacks the abstract-bootstrap line for the two added cannibal sites, the perf counter line, and job-identifying bandit/cannibal artifact lines for all three hostile site profiles.

evidence_contract.claim: three active hostile overmap AI sites -- one bandit remembered-lead stalk site and two direct-range cannibal stalk sites -- can advance through a real 30-minute live cadence with signals=0 while emitting compact timing/counter evidence
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for performance
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No performance-row credit if startup/load, startup fixture seed transform evidence for both added cannibal sites, bandit fixture preflight, same-run abstract-bootstrap proof for the two added cannibal sites, bounded wait/cadence action, same-run perf counter line, and job-identifying bandit/cannibal artifact lines are not all present and classified separately.
